使用一个 VPD-R (10h) 标签作为只读关键字的头部。VPD-R 列表(包括 tag 和 length)必须校验和为零。尝试写入只读数据将作为 no-op(空操作)执行。

使用一个 VPD-W (11h) 标签作为读写关键字的头部。包含读/写数据的存储组件是非易失性设备,断电后将保留数据。

最后一个标签必须是 End Tag (结束标签, 0Fh)。

典型 VPD 中所用资源数据类型标签的小型示例如 § Table 6-21 所示。

Table 6-21. Resource Data Type Flags for a Typical VPD | 表 6-21. 典型 VPD 的资源数据类型标志

Tag Type Description
TAG 02h Large Resource Data Type Identifier String (标识字符串)
TAG 10h Large Resource Data Type VPD-R list containing one or more VPD keywords (包含一个或多个 VPD 关键字的 VPD-R 列表)
TAG 11h Large Resource Data Type VPD-W list containing one or more VPD keywords (包含一个或多个 VPD 关键字的 VPD-W 列表)
TAG 0Fh Small Resource Data Type End Tag (结束标签)

⬆️ 返回目录

<<<PAGE_BREAK>>> page_874

6.27.1 VPD Format | VPD 格式

table>

🇬🇧 English 🇨🇳 中文

Information fields within a VPD resource type consist of a three-byte header followed by some amount of data (see § Figure 6-34). The three-byte header contains a two-byte keyword and a one-byte length. A keyword is a two-character (ASCII) mnemonic that uniquely identifies the information in the field. The last byte of the header is binary and represents the length value (in bytes) of the data that follows.

7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +0   Keyword
7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +1   Keyword
7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +2   Length (N)
7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +3   Data (bytes 3 to N+2, figure shows N = 6)
                          Byte 0 →
                          Byte 4 →
                          Byte 8 →

Figure 6-34 VPD Format

VPD keywords are listed in two categories: read-only fields and read/write fields. Unless otherwise noted, keyword data fields are provided as ASCII characters. Use of ASCII allows keyword data to be moved across different enterprise computer systems without translation difficulty.

An example of the "add-in card serial number" VPD item is as follows:

VPD 资源类型内的信息字段由一个三字节头部和随后的若干数据组成(参见 § Figure 6-34)。三字节头部包含一个两字节的 keyword (关键字) 和一个一字节的 length (长度)。关键字是一个两字符(ASCII)的助记符,用于唯一标识字段中的信息。头部的最后一个字节是二进制,表示后续数据的长度值(以字节为单位)。

7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +0   Keyword (关键字)
7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +1   Keyword (关键字)
7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +2   Length (长度, N)
7  6  5  4  3  2  1  0  +3   Data (数据, 字节 3 至 N+2,图中 N = 6)
                          Byte 0 →
                          Byte 4 →
                          Byte 8 →

Figure 6-34 VPD 格式

VPD 关键字分为两类:只读字段和读/写字段。除非另有说明,关键字数据字段以 ASCII 字符提供。ASCII 的使用允许关键字数据可在不同企业计算机系统之间传输而无需翻译。

"插卡序列号" (add-in card serial number) VPD 条目示例如下:

Figure 6-34. VPD Format

Table 6-22. Example of Add-in Card Serial Number | 表 6-22. 插卡序列号示例

Byte Value Field Description
Byte 0 53h "S" Keyword: SN (第一个字符) Keyword 第一个字符 'S'
Byte 1 4Eh "N" Keyword: SN (第二个字符) Keyword 第二个字符 'N'
Byte 3 08h Length: 8 长度: 8
Byte 4 30h "0" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '0'
Byte 5 30h "0" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '0'
Byte 6 30h "0" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '0'
Byte 7 30h "0" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '0'
Byte 8 30h "0" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '0'
Byte 9 31h "1" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '1'
Byte 10 39h "9" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '9'
Byte 11 34h "4" Data: "00000194" 数据字符 '4'

⬆️ 返回目录

<<<PAGE_BREAK>>> page_875

6.27.2 VPD Definitions | VPD 定义

🇬🇧 English 🇨🇳 中文

This section describes the current VPD large and small resource data tags plus the VPD keywords. This list may be enhanced at any time. Companies wishing to define a new keyword should contact the PCISIG. All unspecified values are reserved for SIG assignment.

VPD is contained in four types of Large and Small Resource Data Tags. The following tags and VPD keyword fields may be provided in PCI devices.

本节介绍当前的 VPD 大型和小 Resource Data Tag 以及 VPD 关键字。此列表可随时增强。希望定义新关键字的公司应联系 PCISIG。所有未指定的值均保留供 SIG 分配。

VPD 包含在四种类型的大型和小型 Resource Data Tag 中。以下标签和 VPD 关键字字段可在 PCI 设备中提供。

Table 6-23. VPD Large and Small Resource Data Tags | 表 6-23. VPD 大型与小型资源数据类型标签

Tag Type Description
String Tag (02h) Large resource type Identifier This tag is the first item in the VPD storage component. It contains the name of the add-in card in alphanumeric characters. (此标签是 VPD 存储组件中的第一项。它以字母数字字符包含插卡的名称。)
VPD-R Tag (10h) Large resource type VPD-R Tag This tag contains the read only VPD keywords for an add-in card. (此标签包含插卡的只读 VPD 关键字。)
VPD-W Tag (11h) Large resource type VPD-W Tag This tag contains the read/write VPD keywords for an add-in card. (此标签包含插卡的读/写 VPD 关键字。)
End Tag (0Fh) Small resource type End Tag This tag identifies the end of VPD in the storage component. (此标签标识存储组件中 VPD 的结束。)

Table 6-24. VPD Read-Only Fields | 表 6-24. VPD 只读字段

Keyword Name Description
PN Add-in Card Part Number This keyword is provided as an extension to the Device ID (or Subsystem ID) in the Configuration Space header in § Figure 6-34. (此关键字作为 Configuration Space header 中 Device ID (或 Subsystem ID) 的扩展提供,参见 § Figure 6-34。)
EC Engineering Change Level of the Add-in Card The characters are alphanumeric and represent the engineering change level for this add-in card. (字符为字母数字,表示此插卡的工程变更级别。)
FG Fabric Geography Reserved for legacy use by [PICMG] specifications. (保留供 [PICMG] 规范遗留使用。)
LC Location Reserved for legacy use by [PICMG] specifications. (保留供 [PICMG] 规范遗留使用。)
MN Manufacture ID This keyword is provided as an extension to the Vendor ID (or Subsystem Vendor ID) in the Configuration Space header in § Figure 6-34. This allows vendors the flexibility to identify an additional level of detail pertaining to the sourcing of this device. (此关键字作为 Configuration Space header 中 Vendor ID (或 Subsystem Vendor ID) 的扩展提供,参见 § Figure 6-34。这允许供应商灵活地识别与该设备采购相关的额外详细信息级别。)
PG PCI Geography Reserved for legacy use by [PICMG] specifications. (保留供 [PICMG] 规范遗留使用。)
SN Serial Number The characters are alphanumeric and represent the unique add-in card Serial Number. (字符为字母数字,表示唯一的插卡序列号。)

⬆️ 返回目录

6.27.2.1 VPD Large and Small Resource Data Tags | VPD 大资源和小资源数据标签

🇬🇧 English 🇨🇳 中文

Table 6-24 VPD Read-Only Fields

Keyword Name Description
TR Thermal Reporting This keyword provides a standard interface for reporting four fields: AFI Level, MaxTherm, DTherm, and MaxAmbient. The data area for this field is four bytes long. This data is encoded as a 4-byte binary value in little endian order (byte 0 contains bits 7:0). This value contains the four fields as follows: AFI Level bits [3:0], MaxTherm bits [7:4], DTherm bits [11:8], and MaxAmbient bits [19:12] are placed in bits 19:0. Bits 31:20 are Reserved and must be set to 000h. Field description is provided within the [CEM]. This keyword is intended to be used only in designs based on that form factor specification. Note that due to the character nature of the VPD encoding mechanism, this binary value is permitted to start on any byte boundary within the VPD.
Vx Vendor Specific This is a vendor specific item and the characters are alphanumeric. The second character (x) of the keyword can be 0 through 9 or A through Z.
CP Extended Capability This field allows a new capability to be identified in the VPD area. Since dynamic control/status cannot be placed in VPD, the data for this field identifies where, in the device's memory or I/O address space, the control/status registers for the capability can be found. Location of the control/status registers is identified by providing the index (a value between 0 and 5) of the Base Address register that defines the address range that contains the registers, and the offset within that Base Address register range where the control/status registers reside. The data area for this field is four bytes long. The first byte contains the ID of the extended capability. The second byte contains the index (zero based) of the Base Address register used. The next two bytes contain the offset (in little-endian order) within that address range where the control/status registers defined for that capability reside.
RV Checksum and Reserved The first byte of this item is a checksum byte. The checksum is correct if the sum of all bytes in VPD (from VPD address 0 up to and including this byte) is zero. The remainder of this item is reserved space (as needed) to identify the last byte of read-only space. The read-write area does not have a checksum. This field is required.
FF Form Factor This keyword indicates a string that identifies the form factor and version associated with this add-in-card. Values are a lower case string. The string consists of a list of one or more elements separated by colons (":"). The first element is a sequence of lowercase strings separated by periods that identifies the specification(s) associated with the form factor. The first element string is the reserved domain name associated with the authority defining that form factor (i.e., like those used in [DNS] records), followed by one or more strings that identify a particular form factor, followed by a Version Number for that form factor specification. Any characters in the form factor name other than "a" to "z", "0" to "9", "", "?", and "-" are dropped (e.g., M.2 becomes m2). The character "" represents a wild card (arbitrary characters, including "."). The value "-" is used to indicate no form factor. The value "?" or the absence of the FF keyword is used to indicate that the form factor is unknown. Subsequent elements are optional and contain attributes describing variations of that form factor (e.g., size, connector, keying, …). These elements are defined by the indicated form-factor specifiation and consist of either an "option" string or a "key=value" string. Valid characters in the "option" or "key" portion are "a" to "z", "0" to "9", "", "?", and "-". The "value" portion may contain any character other than the colon ":". The order of attributes is not significant. Attributes are not permitted when the first element is "-" or "?" (no form factor or unknown form factor). Examples are:
• com.pcisig.cem.4.0
• com.pcisig.cem.
• com.pcisig.m2.1.0:2280
• com.pcisig.m2.1.0:size=2280:key=M
• com.pcisig.m2.1.0:bga
• org.snia.sff-ta-1001.1.0.2

A given add-in card is permitted to claim conformance to multiple form factor specifications. This is indicated by using the wild card character "*" or by using multiple FF fields (which in turn could use the wild card character). When the form factor of a slot does not match some FF keyword of the add-in card in that slot, this indicates the presence of one or more "Carrier Cards" to convert power and sideband signals of the slot to those of the add-in card. The mechanism(s) used to identify a particular Carrier Card and to describe how it operates are outside the scope of this specification.

表 6-24 VPD 只读字段

关键字 名称 描述
TR 热报告 (Thermal Reporting) 此关键字提供一个标准接口用于上报四个字段：AFI Level、MaxTherm、DTherm 和 MaxAmbient。该字段的数据区为 4 字节长。数据以小端序 (little endian) 编码为 4 字节二进制值 (byte 0 包含 bit 7:0)。该值按如下方式承载四个字段：AFI Level 占用 bit [3:0]，MaxTherm 占用 bit [7:4]，DTherm 占用 bit [11:8]，MaxAmbient 占用 bit [19:12]，它们一起放置在 bit 19:0 之内。Bit 31:20 为保留位 (Reserved)，必须设置为 000h。字段描述见 [CEM]。此关键字仅用于基于该外形规格 (Form Factor) 规范的设计中。需要注意的是，由于 VPD 编码机制的字符特性，该二进制值允许从 VPD 内的任意字节边界开始。
Vx 厂商特定 (Vendor Specific) 这是一个厂商特定项，字符为字母数字形式。关键字的第二个字符 (x) 可以是 0–9 或 A–Z。
CP 扩展能力 (Extended Capability) 该字段用于在 VPD 区域中标识一个新的能力 (Capability)。由于动态控制/状态不能放在 VPD 中，此字段的数据指明：在设备内存或 I/O 地址空间中，该能力的控制/状态寄存器所在位置。控制/状态寄存器的位置通过提供基址寄存器 (Base Address Register) 的索引 (0–5 之间的值) 来标识，索引对应包含寄存器的地址范围，以及在该基址寄存器范围内的偏移 (offset) 来指明控制/状态寄存器的具体位置。该字段的数据区为 4 字节长。第一个字节包含扩展能力的 ID。第二个字节包含所用基址寄存器的索引 (从 0 开始)。接下来两个字节以小端序表示该地址范围内的偏移 (offset)，即该能力定义的控制/状态寄存器所在的地址。
RV 校验和与保留 (Checksum and Reserved) 该项的第一个字节为校验和字节。当 VPD 中所有字节 (从 VPD 地址 0 到包括此字节) 之和为零时，校验和正确。该项的其余部分为保留空间 (按需)，用于标识只读空间的最后一个字节。读/写区域没有校验和。此字段是必需的。
FF 外形规格 (Form Factor) 此关键字表示一个字符串，用于标识与该插卡 (add-in-card) 关联的外形规格和版本。值为小写字符串。该字符串由一个或多个元素组成，元素之间以冒号 (":") 分隔。第一个元素是由句点分隔的小写字符串序列，用于标识与该外形规格关联的规范。第一个元素字符串是为该外形规格定义机构保留的域名 (即与 [DNS] 记录所用类似)，后跟一个或多个用于标识特定外形规格的字符串，再后跟该外形规格规范的版本号 (Version Number)。外形规格名称中除 "a"–"z"、"0"–"9"、""、"?"、"-" 以外的任何字符都将被丢弃 (例如 M.2 变成 m2)。字符 "" 表示通配符 (任意字符，包括 ".")。值 "-" 用于表示无外形规格。值 "?" 或 FF 关键字的缺失用于表示外形规格未知。后续元素是可选的，包含描述该外形规格变体的属性 (例如尺寸、连接器、键位等)。这些元素由所引用的外形规格规范定义，由 "option" 字符串或 "key=value" 字符串组成。"option" 或 "key" 部分的合法字符为 "a"–"z"、"0"–"9"、""、"?"、"-"。"value" 部分可包含除冒号 ":" 以外的任何字符。属性的顺序无关紧要。当第一个元素为 "-" 或 "?" (无外形规格或未知外形规格) 时不允许使用属性。示例如下：
• com.pcisig.cem.4.0
• com.pcisig.cem.
• com.pcisig.m2.1.0:2280
• com.pcisig.m2.1.0:size=2280:key=M
• com.pcisig.m2.1.0:bga
• org.snia.sff-ta-1001.1.0.2

允许一张插卡 (add-in card) 声明符合多个外形规格规范。这通过使用通配符 "*" 或使用多个 FF 字段 (这些字段本身也可以使用通配符) 来表示。当插槽的外形规格与该插槽中插卡的某个 FF 关键字不匹配时，这表示存在一个或多个 "转接卡 (Carrier Cards)"，用于将插槽的电源和边带 (Sideband) 信号转换为该插卡所对应的信号。用于识别特定转接卡并描述其工作方式的机制不在本规范范围内。

6.27.2.2 Read-Only Fields | 只读字段

table>

🇬🇧 English 🇨🇳 中文

Table 6-25 VPD Read/Write Fields

Keyword Name Description
Vx Vendor Specific This is a vendor specific item and the characters are alphanumeric. The second character (x) of the keyword can be 0 through 9 or A through Z.
Yx System Specific This is a system specific item and the characters are alphanumeric. The second character (x) of the keyword can be 0 through 9 or B through Z.
YA Asset Tag Identifier This is a system specific item and the characters are alphanumeric. This keyword contains the system asset identifier provided by the system owner.
RW Remaining Read/Write Area This descriptor is used to identify the unused portion of the read/write space. The product vendor initializes this parameter based on the size of the read/write space or the space remaining following the Vx VPD items. One or more of the Vx, Yx, and RW items are required.

表 6-25 VPD 读/写字段

关键字 名称 描述
Vx 厂商特定 (Vendor Specific) 这是一个厂商特定项，字符为字母数字形式。关键字的第二个字符 (x) 可以是 0–9 或 A–Z。
Yx 系统特定 (System Specific) 这是一个系统特定项，字符为字母数字形式。关键字的第二个字符 (x) 可以是 0–9 或 B–Z。
YA 资产标签标识符 (Asset Tag Identifier) 这是一个系统特定项，字符为字母数字形式。此关键字包含系统所有者提供的系统资产标识符。
RW 剩余读/写区域 (Remaining Read/Write Area) 此描述符用于标识读/写空间中未使用的部分。产品厂商根据读/写空间的大小或 Vx VPD 项之后剩余的空间初始化此参数。Vx、Yx 和 RW 项中的一项或多项是必需的。

<<<PAGE_BREAK>>> page_877

6.27.2.3 Read/Write Fields | 读/写字段

以下是一个典型 VPD 的示例。
